title: Survive and Conquest Resource Pack
description: Conquest Reforged mod compatibility and other textures for the Conquest and Survive Modpack.
body:
[![Project Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iBiOO1X.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/rTrmBCww) Resource pack support for small mods in the [Survive and Conquest](https://modrinth.com/modpack/survive-and-conquest) modpack, matching them to the style of the [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) mod.

Current mods:
[Wearable Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearable-lanterns)
[Emerald Equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/emerald-equipment)
[Tropics](https://modrinth.com/mod/tropics)
[Infusion Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/infusion-table)
[Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) _(Partial)_
[Cosmetic Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor)
[Enchanting System Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-system-overhaul)
[Stonecutter GUI Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/stonecutter-gui-remastered)
[Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) _(Partial)_
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) _(Partial)_
[Stewing & Baking](https://modrinth.com/mod/stewing-baking)
Various tweaks to [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) to fit the modpack better


### Huge thanks and credit to Monsterfish for allowing me to use some textures from [Conquest_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/conquest_)
